meaning: n.版,印刷物,印迹,印章,印刷业,照片v.印刷,出版,印于,用印刷体写 [计]打印
examples: Click on the icon when you want to print.
I got a kick out of seeing my name in print.
Wayne plans to increase the print run to 1,000.
Invitations to Christie's private auctions in Dalton's Print Rooms in fashionable Pall Mall were highly coveted.
The group counts another 32 print and broadcast journalists who have met the same fate.
